source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Enable preventive maintenance scheduling by time, mileage, or hours. Be able to track units by hours and miles.
comment: PM schedules can be set by calendar interval, mileage, or engine hours. All units are tracked by both odometer and hour meter readings, with full PM history per asset.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Track service history, labor, and costs per vehicle.
comment: Full service history, labor time, and cost tracking at the individual vehicle/asset level. Drill-down reporting available per asset across all work order history.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Manage parts, consumables, and supplies across multiple facilities.
comment: Spare EAM supports multi-location inventory management across facilities, warehouses, and mobile storerooms in a single system.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Support barcode scanning and purchase order management.
comment: Barcode and QR scanning is supported via the Spare mobile app. Purchase order creation and management are included in the standard platform.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Create and manage work orders for scheduled PM and unscheduled/corrective work.
comment: Full work order creation and management is supported for both scheduled preventive maintenance and unscheduled/corrective work across all asset types.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Integration with Tyler Munis or other financial systems.
comment: Spare EAM does not currently have a pre-built integration with Tyler Munis. Integration via Spare's Open API is technically possible and the scope, including data flows for AP, payroll, and GL, would be defined during discovery. Spare recommends scheduling a dedicated integration scoping session with the City's IT team.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Role-based access control (RBAC) with configurable permissions.
comment: Full role-based access control (RBAC) is included with configurable permission sets by module, data type, and user role.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Security: MFA, data encryption in transit and at rest, and automated backups with documented RPO/RTO.
comment: MFA is enforced at login. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest (AES-256). Automated backups are configured with documented RPO/RTO targets available in Spare's Security documentation upon request.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Maintain detailed asset records including VIN, acquisition, cost, warranty, recalls and lifecycle.
comment: Spare EAM maintains full asset records including VIN, acquisition date and cost, warranty terms, and complete lifecycle tracking out of the box. Safety recall tracking is not currently a native feature and is on Spare's product roadmap.

source_file: Laramie RFP - Spare EAM Response Matrix (Updated) [SAMPLE]
requirement: Support a minimum of 1 picture of the units on their individual dashboard.
comment: Each asset record supports photo attachments displayed on the asset dashboard. Multiple photos are supported per asset.
